1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- Local LLM runtime: [e.g. LM Studio 0.2.5]

- App version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help reproduce or diagnose the issue.
